user1.name: Ngoc Anh
user1.feedback: I significantly improved my pronunciation after a few weeks of practice. The listening-speaking exercises are very close to real-life communication.

user2.name: Minh Tuan
user2.feedback: Smart flashcards help me remember vocabulary longer. Studying 15-20 minutes a day but the results are clear.

user3.name: Thu Trang
user3.feedback: Easy-to-use interface, clear roadmap so I don't get discouraged. Motivated to study every day.

footer.description: Practicing English speaking helps improve pronunciation, communication reflexes, increase confidence, and expand opportunities.

about.heroDescription: A smart English learning platform — helping you practice speaking, build vocabulary, and communicate confidently every day.
about.missionText: LingoSpeak is built to help English learners in Vietnam approach the language naturally and effectively — no pressure, no boredom, just 15-20 minutes a day.

listeningSpeaking.title: Listening & Speaking Practice
listeningSpeaking.desc: Practice real conversations with natural communication reflexes.

smartFlashcard.title: Smart Flashcards
smartFlashcard.desc: Memorize vocabulary faster with flashcards personalized to your progress.

recording.title: Recording & Comparison
recording.desc: Compare your voice with native speakers to improve pronunciation.

topicLearning.title: Learn by Topic
topicLearning.desc: Choose topics that match your learning goals and daily communication.

about.learningPathSubtitle: Each topic on LingoSpeak follows a clear path, helping you learn vocabulary and practice speaking at the same time.

step1.title: Choose a Topic
step1.desc: Start with familiar everyday topics like family, travel, work...

step2.title: Learn Vocabulary
step2.desc: Memorize new words with flashcards, standard IPA pronunciation, and illustrative examples.

step3.title: Practice Conversation
step3.desc: Read and listen to sample conversations to understand how words are used in real context.

step4.title: Practice Speaking
step4.desc: Practice pronunciation, record and compare with native speakers to communicate confidently.
